name: Jez
about: Welcome to my public corner of the internet. This site is evolving into a home for projects, utilities, game prototypes, AI news, and personal creative stuff.

projects.name: How AI Works
projects.desc: Interactive explainer covering neural networks, LLMs, training, hallucinations, and more. Built with React + Framer Motion.

projects.name: AI News Feed
projects.desc: Curated AI model releases, tooling updates, and notable research.

projects.name: Top 4 AI Models
projects.desc: Opinionated standalone page: best picks for coding, conversation, voice-native commercial work, and cheap practical use.

projects.name: Game Experiments
projects.desc: Playable prototypes and mechanics tests from GameMaster runs.

projects.name: Photo Gallery
projects.desc: Personal photos, edits, and restoration showcases.

tools.name: Image Prep Utility
tools.desc: Resize + rename uploads for cleaner website workflows.

tools.name: Print Sizing / DPI Checker
tools.desc: Quickly verify output dimensions and print-safe quality.

tools.name: Filename Batch Cleaner
tools.desc: Normalize messy file names before publishing.

games.name: ⚔️ Missile Command: Aurora Siege
games.desc: Built by Claude Opus 4.6. Defend the skyline from waves of missiles — tap to fire interceptors, chain explosions, earn combos. Shifting aurora sky, detailed cityscape, synthesized audio. Mobile-first.

games.name: ⚔️ Missile Command: GPT Build
games.desc: Same brief. Different model. Built from scratch by GPT-5.4. Same concept, totally different execution — tap to compare how two frontier models interpret the same classic. Mobile-first.

games.name: 🪨 Boulder Dash
games.desc: Dig through caves, collect diamonds, dodge falling boulders and enemies. Classic arcade puzzler rebuilt from scratch.

games.name: ☄️ Asteroids HD
games.desc: Neon vector-style Asteroids. Destroy rocks, dodge debris, survive as long as you can.

photos.name: 🐱 Cat Corner
photos.desc: Luca, Cosmo, Taco & Marty — 26 photos and counting.

photos.name: 🌿 Garden
photos.desc: Small-space growing, seasonal progress, and green experiments.

homelab.name: Model Runtime Snapshot
homelab.desc: At-a-glance view of model/runtime usage and status.

homelab.name: Agent Activity
homelab.desc: Quick view of what assistants/agents are working on.

homelab.name: System Tiles
homelab.desc: CPU / memory / process tiles for home lab visibility.
